CRC错误计数1小时内持续增长: CRC error count keeps growing within 1 hour
SSD闪存块写入失败，闪存芯片健康度急剧下降，需立即备份数据: SSD flash block program failures; flash chip health is degrading rapidly, back up data immediately
SSD闪存块擦除失败，意味着闪存芯片老化，存在数据写入故障风险: SSD flash block erase failures indicate aging flash chips and a risk of write failures
SSD闪存芯片磨损程度接近耗尽，随时可能发生故障，需立即备份数据并更换硬盘: SSD flash wearout is nearly exhausted and may fail at any time; back up data and replace the drive immediately
数据传输链路CRC校验失败次数增加，可能是接口、线缆或硬盘控制器故障前兆: Growing CRC failures on the data link, a possible precursor of interface, cable or disk controller failure
硬盘自身检测的整体健康状态为不健康，存在严重故障风险，需立即处理: Disk self-assessed overall health is FAILED, serious failure risk, handle immediately
硬盘运行温度过高，会加速硬件老化甚至导致直接故障，需立即检查散热: Disk operating temperature too high, which accelerates aging or causes outright failure; check cooling immediately
